should_trigger: Render backend-provided immutable cell snapshots in the Go multiplexer TUI.
Fix wide-character and combining-mark corruption in terminal frames.
Add golden fixtures for cursor, style, clipping, and alternate-screen rendering.
should_not_trigger: Implement the raw VT parser and authoritative terminal cell-state engine.
Design the daemon event protocol and persistence schema.
Build a React canvas terminal component for the browser.
